NoCustomer: There are no customers in the list.
EmptyFields: Please enter a value for all fields.
FullInstructions:
(1) Add customers using the 'Add Customer' button.
(2) From the details form, you can load an existing customer or clear the fields.
(3) Update or delete customers by clicking on an existing customer in the list, then clicking the appropriate button.
NoCars: There are no cars in the list.
EmptyFieldsCar: Please enter a value for all fields.
InvalidKilometers: Please enter a valid number for the kilometers field.
NoCarSelected: No car is selected to update.
DeleteCarConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this car?
ConfirmUpdateMessage: Are you sure you want to update this car?
ConfirmAddMessage: Are you sure you want to add this new car?
CopyPreviousCarMessage: Do you want to load the details of the last entered car?
CarInstructions:
(1) Add cars using the 'Add New Car' button.
(2) Select a car from the list to update or delete it.
(3) Use 'Load Last Car' to copy the previously entered car details.
(4) All fields must be filled before submitting.
